subject: Cannot reset password
description: I requested a password reset but never received the confirmation email in my inbox.

subject: API response time is too slow
description: The API is taking longer than 5 seconds to respond to simple queries. This is impacting our integration.

subject: Upgrade pricing inquiry
description: I want to upgrade my plan but the pricing page doesn't show the monthly vs annual cost comparison.

subject: Mobile app crashes on startup
description: The iOS app immediately crashes when I try to launch it on my iPhone 14 running iOS 17.

subject: Feature: Batch operations API
description: We need an API endpoint that allows batch operations to reduce the number of individual API calls required.

subject: Two-factor auth login loop
description: After entering the 2FA code I'm stuck in a redirect loop and cannot complete the login process.

subject: Duplicate billing entries
description: My billing statement shows duplicate entries for the same transaction on different dates. Please correct this.

subject: Export data in JSON format
description: Our workflow requires JSON output format for data export. Currently only CSV is supported.

subject: Unable to upload files larger than 5MB
description: The file upload feature rejects any files larger than 5MB. We need support for larger uploads.

subject: Scheduled maintenance impact
description: The recent maintenance window broke our scheduled integration tasks. They were running perfectly before.

subject: Refund not received after 2 weeks
description: I initiated a refund 14 days ago but it hasn't appeared in my bank account yet.

subject: Dark mode implementation request
description: Many users are requesting a dark mode option for the web interface to reduce eye strain.

subject: Webhook signature validation failing
description: Our webhook receiver is rejecting all incoming webhooks due to signature validation failures.

subject: Account data export functionality
description: I need to export all my account data for compliance with data portability requirements.

subject: API key expiration warning
description: Please add email notifications for API key expiration so we don't lose access unexpectedly.

subject: Search autocomplete not working
description: The search autocomplete feature stopped working after the latest update.

subject: Team collaboration features needed
description: Our organization would benefit from shared workspaces and team collaboration capabilities.

subject: PDF export quality issues
description: The exported PDF files have poor image quality and formatting issues that make them unusable.

subject: Multi-currency support for invoices
description: We operate in multiple countries and need invoices to display in the appropriate currency.

subject: Connection timeout on large dataset queries
description: Queries on large datasets consistently timeout. We need better performance or the ability to increase timeout limits.
